text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem other-clinical-services-cs

This case-sensitive code system http://fhir.et/core/CodeSystem/other-clinical-services-cs defines the following codes:

CodeDisplay
vaccination Assessment and provision of vaccinations
hbv-hcv Hepatitis B (HBV) and hepatitis C virus (HCV) testing and treatment provided
cotrimoxazole Co-trimoxazole chemoprophylaxis to prevent Pneumocystis carinii pneumonia
tb-screening Intensified TB case finding and linkage to TB treatment provided
ipt Provision of isoniazid preventive therapy if person does not have TB
malaria Malaria prevention (such as bed nets and prophylaxis), depending on epidemiology

name: OtherClinicalServicesCS
title: Other Clinical Services Offered CodeSystem
description: Other clinical services offered to the client
